<!-- skills/setup-environment/references/env-checklist-template.md -->
<!-- Template for the manual environment setup checklist generated by setup-environment Phase 3. The skill generates one instance of this template per project, substituting real service names, key names, file paths, and console URLs detected from .env.example files. -->

# Environment Setup Checklist

> Generated by `setup-environment` — Stage 3 of your phased plan.
>
> Complete every item below before confirming "done". Once you confirm, the
> `env-verifier` subagent will scan your `.env.local` files and flag any
> missing or placeholder values.
>
> **Security reminder:** never commit `.env.local` to version control.
> `.env.local` should be in `.gitignore` — confirm this before adding secrets.

---

## [SERVICE NAME]

> Provisioning console: [URL]

[ ] Create a [Service Name] project / account at [URL]
[ ] Copy the following keys to `apps/<app>/.env.local`:
    - `KEY_1`
    - `KEY_2`
[ ] Add the following as GitHub repository secrets (Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions):
    - `KEY_1` — needed by `.github/workflows/<workflow>.yml`

---

## [SECOND SERVICE NAME]

> Provisioning console: [URL]

[ ] Create a [Service Name] project / account at [URL]
[ ] Copy the following keys to `apps/<app>/.env.local`:
    - `KEY_A`
    - `KEY_B`
[ ] (No GitHub secrets needed for this service)

---

## GitHub Secrets

> These values must be added via GitHub UI — the skill cannot verify them.
> Go to: **Your Repo → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret**
>
> After adding all secrets, confirm below.

[ ] `KEY_1` — used by `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
[ ] `KEY_2` — used by `.github/workflows/e2e.yml`
[ ] All GitHub repository secrets confirmed added

---

## Final Confirmation

[ ] All `.env.local` files created (one per app / package that has a `.env.example`)
[ ] All secret values are real (not placeholder strings like `xxx`, `your_key_here`, or `<placeholder>`)
[ ] `.env.local` is listed in `.gitignore` (never commit secrets)
[ ] GitHub repository secrets added for CI workflows (or confirmed not needed)

---

<!-- GENERATION NOTES FOR setup-environment:
  When generating a real checklist from this template:

  1. Replace [SERVICE NAME] with the actual service name from known-services-catalog.md.
  2. Replace [URL] with the provisioning_url from the catalog entry.
  3. Replace KEY_1, KEY_2 etc. with the actual env var names found in the .env.example file.
  4. Replace apps/<app>/.env.local with the actual path (e.g. apps/web/.env.local).
  5. For the "GitHub Secrets" section, only include keys that appear in .github/workflows/*.yml
     as ${{ secrets.KEY_NAME }} references AND that correspond to .env.example keys.
  6. Order services: Supabase → Stripe → Resend → Clerk → Auth0 → NextAuth → PostHog →
     Sentry → Vercel → GitHub → OpenAI → Anthropic → Other.
  7. Omit any service section if zero keys from that service were detected.
  8. Omit the "GitHub Secrets" section if no CI workflow secrets were detected.
  9. Checkboxes MUST be [ ] with NO leading dash. Example: [ ] Do this thing.
     Do NOT write: - [ ] Do this thing.
-->
